Answer retained Cloud Run AI analysis basis and server realtime data tool metadata.
No unsafe command or mutation path was introduced; fix only narrows frontend clarification gating for follow-up context references.
GitLab semver tag pipeline completed successfully and Vercel production served the expected version and commit.
Regression is covered by targeted Vitest and production Playwright MCP evidence.
